title: Calculate the Net Force
text: To find the net force acting on the object, sum up the three given forces: $$F_1$$, $$F_2$$, and $$F_3$$.

title: Sum the Forces
text: Calculate the net force by adding the components of $$F_1$$, $$F_2$$, and $$F_3$$.

title: Use Newton's Second Law
text: Use the formula $$F=ma$$ to find the acceleration vector, where F is the net force and $$m$$ is the mass of the object.

title: Find the Mass
text: Given the magnitude of acceleration is $$4.23$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$, use the net force to find the mass of the object.

title: Calculate the Velocity Components
text: Use the formula $$v=at$$ to find the velocity components after $$5.00$$ s, where a is the acceleration vector and $$t$$ is the time.

title: Compute the Velocity
text: Calculate the velocity components using the acceleration vector and the time of $$5.00$$ s.
